text.title: On-Call Rotation Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the On-Call Charter, the paging-tool schedule, and the weekly on-call-load report.

forbidden.pattern: charter.tiers = primary AND charter.participants >= 8 (single-tier rotation for a team large enough to support secondary)
charter.ack_sla_seconds with sev1 > 600 (sev-1 must be under 10 minutes)
charter.comp_policy_doc_url empty OR pointing to a placeholder
schedule.config_path missing OR not committed to a version-controlled repo (paging schedules drift without VC)
load_report omitted for more than 2 consecutive weeks (load-blindness is the failure mode the report exists to prevent)
red_line_crossings list non-empty AND recommended_action equals "monitor" — the red-line is the action threshold, not the watchlist

allowed-transformations.transformation: Adjust shift_length when participant count drops below 5 (move to external retainer + smaller in-house rotation).
Suspend swap requests during a critical-release week with explicit announcement; do not silently freeze.

list.item: Charter published to team wiki BEFORE first shift
Paging tool config committed to a version-controlled repo
Ack SLAs enforced in the tool, not by social pressure
Comp policy URL resolves to a real HR-handbook page
Weekly load report runs automatically on a cron, sent to engineering leader
Red-line crossings produce a named action, not just a notification
